body: Forge pass 8 (EA<->indicator reinforcement/coherence pass) is complete. Dense 4-dimension audit across all 9 companion indicators (parameter fidelity, buffer semantics, calibration/live parity, scale/structural) found the interface fully coherent -- zero new defects, so no version bump was made (still SLS(37)/9.51). One apparent shift-convention anomaly was investigated and ruled out as correct-by-precedent, not a bug. Attached: the findings as a .txt, and the current TUNGSTEN EA source (unchanged). Ledger updated (pass_8 entry). Still open: all 21 prior warrants remain unvalidated against a real calibration run -- that's the top priority whenever the market is next open.
